_notes: v2.7 hybrid retrieval baseline. Floors come from v2.6's vector+rerank baseline on the same gold set.
1. Delta: current.scorers[s].ndcgAt8 + 0.02 >= baseline.scorers[s].ndcgAt8 for every scorer.
2. Absolute floor: current.scorers.hybridRRF.ndcgAt8 >= floors.ndcgAt8 AND recallAt8 >= floors.recallAt8.

Scorer baseline numbers below are placeholders representing the v2.7 contract; the full eval extension (scripts/eval.ts) is a v2.7.1 follow-up. Unit tests TS-001..TS-005 in tests/unit/retriever.test.ts already lock in the hybrid behavior contract.
